data.acceptance:
1. `kno skills install` successfully installs skills to ./.agents/skills directory
2. `kno doctor` correctly detects and reports Codex project-level skills in ./.agents/skills
3. `kno doctor --fix` can initialize or repair the ./.agents/skills directory structure
4. New tests verify Codex project-level skill detection and installation
5. `make sanity` passes with coverage maintained above threshold
